headline: Zoom Room Names Former Petco CEO Ron Coughlin Chairman of the Board as Brand Accelerates National Expansion
summary: Zoom Room, the revolutionary indoor dog training gym, has brought two leaders into the organization with decades of experience with iconic consumer and pet brands. Ron Coughlin has been named Chairman of the Board and Soumik Chatterjee joins Zoom Room as Chief Financial Officer.

headline: Does Coca-Cola's AI and Cloud Push Signal a New Tech-Led Growth Phase?
summary: KO ramps up AI and cloud across its value chain, boosting execution, insights and innovation, but stops short of a full tech-led growth pivot.

headline: PepsiCo’s Sustainability Role At 2026 Summit And What It Means For Valuation
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) is set to play a major role at Sustainability LIVE: The US Summit in April 2026. The company’s sustainability leaders will join keynote sessions with other large organizations. Discussions will focus on the evolving role of Chief Sustainability Officers and how they influence business transformation. For investors watching PepsiCo, this development sits at the intersection of consumer brands and corporate sustainability. The company operates a global food and beverage...
